Quick ML quiz — can you spot the right answer? 🤔

Why scale features before training a linear model?

A) For code beauty
B) Features of different scales hurt convergence and make coefficients incomparable
C) To remove missing values
D) Scaling enlarges the data

Answer below — I'll post the explanation tomorrow!

Quick ML quiz for your feed.

Why should you scale features before training a linear model?

A) For code beauty
B) Features of different scales hurt convergence and make coefficients incomparable
C) To remove missing values
D) Scaling enlarges the data

Drop your answer in the comments — I'll share the full explanation tomorrow.
